perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator standing in front of a Costco sign, holding a Costco membership card and a magnetic sticker while gesturing towards the camera. (2) A rapid series of jump cuts begins, showcasing various products on warehouse shelves, including milk powder, coconut water, laundry pods, dental floss, snacks, and frozen foods. (3) The camera focuses on the product packaging, often with a hand briefly touching or pointing at the item to highlight it within the warehouse environment. (4) The sequence continues through dozens of items, concluding with household goods like cat litter and laundry detergent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat, and fast-paced background music begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice provides a rapid-fire narration, announcing the name of each product and its discounted price in perfect synchronization with the visual cuts. (3) The vocal tone is enthusiastic, professional, and consistent with variety show-style commentary. (4) There is no detectable ambient noise or environmental sound from the warehouse, indicating a studio-recorded voiceover overlaying the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好市多 每週特價速報 06/09-06/15' (Costco Weekly Special Report June 9 - June 15). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '記得追蹤我們 免費會員卡磁鐵' (Remember to follow us for a free membership card magnet). (3) Functional Text: Every product shown is accompanied by a large text overlay detailing the brand name, product name, original price, discount amount (preceded by a minus sign), and the final 'Special Price' in red.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with creator -> Rapid-fire product list -> Final deal announcement.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appears at the start; hands appear throughout to point at products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male wearing a red t-shirt and glasses, appearing energetic and friendly.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, characterized by high metal shelving, bulk-packaged goods, industrial lighting, and refrigerated sections.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> List of Deals
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The primary objective of this video is to serve as a fast-paced shopping guide for Costco members in Taiwan. It utilizes a montage structure to efficiently present a large volume of time-sensitive discount information, encouraging viewers to visit the store during the specified dates and follow the creator for more updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides a comprehensive list of prices and discounts specifically for Costco products, acting as a promotional guide for the retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed narration synchronized with product reveals; consistent use of colorful price comparison graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is highly optimized for short-form social media consumption (e.g., TikTok, Reels) through its 9:16 aspect ratio and rapid pacing designed to retain attention.
